Due to  a)  the  probability  of escape of the tracks

Some  levels of O-16 were found.  The angular
distributions were fitted by linear  combination  of
The neutron spectra show a  fine  structure  in  good
agreement  with  the  fine  structure  found  in the
proton spectra and in the  (gamma,n)  and  (gamma,p)
From these structures many levels of the O-16 nucleus
are  identified  which  are  in  good agreement with
known levels and some levels given with  uncertainty
For the  O-16(gamma,n)  reaction  the contribution of
direct  process  appears  prevalent  while  for  all
elements  up  to these data investigated evaporation
accounts for the greater part of emitted neutrons.
The ground state transitions amount to at  least  60%
A back   and   front   asymmetry   of   the   angular
distributions of photoneutrons for  single  neutrons
peaks is found in the region of the giant resonance.
Data  were  compiled  at SCJAD of Saratov

spectra of photoneutrons for various angles was made
by means of special  formula  to  obtain  the  cross
section   for   photoabsorption   giving   rise   to
transitions to the ground state of O-15.

2) The position of the peaks marked by  flag  in  the
